task_description: Create a shareable clip from a specific song video, copy its link, and open the clip link in a new tab.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the YouTube search box, outlined in blue to indicate focus, with a semitransparent red X placed on the empty text-entry area inside the field. The full screen shows the YouTube home page in Chinese within a browser. A search suggestions dropdown is open beneath the search bar, listing prior queries such as music-related searches. The left sidebar contains navigation items like Home, Shorts, and Subscriptions, and video thumbnails are visible in the main content area.
caption.action: Click the focused YouTube search field.
caption.expectation: The search box remains active and ready for text entry, with the suggestions list still visible or refreshed.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the YouTube search field at the top of the page with the text "taylor swift - love stor" currently entered, indicating the phrase is being completed in the active search box rather than replacing different visible text. A dropdown of autocomplete suggestions is open directly below, including entries such as "taylor swift - love story", "taylor swift - love story live", and lyric-related variants. The full screen shows the YouTube home page in Chinese in Chrome, with the left navigation sidebar, category chips near the top, and recommended video thumbnails visible behind the suggestions panel.
caption.action: Type "TAYLOR SWIFT - LOVE STORY" into the active YouTube search field, completing the current query.
caption.expectation: The search text in the field updates to the full song title, and the autocomplete suggestions refresh to match the completed query.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the YouTube search field with the query "taylor swift - love story" entered, and a semitransparent red X appears over the search suggestions area beneath it. The full screen shows the YouTube home page in Chinese inside Chrome, with the autocomplete dropdown open under the search bar and suggestions such as "taylor swift - love story" and "taylor swift - love story live." The left sidebar and recommended video thumbnails are visible in the background.
caption.action: Press Enter to submit the current YouTube search query.
caption.expectation: YouTube should load the search results page for "taylor swift - love story."

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the full YouTube search results page rather than a specific control, with no semitransparent red X. Near the top is the search bar containing the query "taylor swift - love story," and below it are filter chips such as 全部, Shorts, 视频, 未观看, 已观看, 最近上传, and 直播. The visible results list shows a large sponsored video at the top, then a result titled "Taylor Swift - Love Story (Lyrics)" with a thumbnail displaying the large white words "LOVE STORY" on a dark blue background, and part of another result below. The full screen confirms this is Chrome on YouTube search results, with the left navigation sidebar, the filter option on the right, and a vertical scrollbar indicating the page can be moved downward.
caption.action: Scroll down on the YouTube results page.
caption.expectation: The search results page moves downward to reveal more videos below the currently visible results.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the video title text "Taylor Swift - Love Story," which is part of a search result entry. Beneath it are the view count and age text in Chinese, plus the channel row with the Taylor Swift name and verified checkmark, confirming the X is on the clickable result title area rather than a toolbar control. The full screen shows the YouTube search results page in Chrome, with this result visible below another "Love Story" result and above more results, indicating the click is on an object in the results list.
caption.action: Click the search result title "Taylor Swift - Love Story."
caption.expectation: The selected result opens, navigating from the search results page to the video's watch page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the leftmost playback control in the YouTube video player's bottom control bar. The button under the X is the pause icon, shown as two vertical white bars inside a circular dark translucent button, with a small tooltip above reading "暂停" and the K keyboard shortcut. A red progress line is visible just above the controls. The full screen shows the YouTube watch page for "Taylor Swift - Love Story" in Chrome, with the video playing in the main player area and the recommendations column on the right.
caption.action: Click the Pause button in the video player's control bar.
caption.expectation: The video playback pauses immediately, and the control should change from a pause icon to a play icon.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the rounded gray button with a scissors icon and the Chinese label "剪辑" in the row of action buttons beneath the YouTube video. Nearby buttons include "保存" to the left and "下载" to the right. The full screen shows the YouTube watch page for "Taylor Swift - Love Story" in Chrome, with the video player on the left, recommendations on the right, and the action button row below the video title and channel information.
caption.action: Click the scissors button labeled "剪辑" below the video.
caption.expectation: The YouTube clip interface should open, likely showing a panel or dialog for creating a clip from the current video.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the left time input box in the YouTube clip editor panel. The box displays the start time "0:02.5" and sits to the left of a dash and the end time box. The full screen shows the YouTube watch page with the "创建剪辑" panel open on the right, including the clip title field, the two time fields, and a thumbnail timeline beneath them.
caption.action: Click the start time input box showing "0:02.5" in the clip editor.
caption.expectation: The start time field should become active for editing, likely showing a text cursor or highlighted value so the clip start time can be changed.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped view shows the YouTube clip editor's right-hand time input area, focused on the end-time field to the right of a dash. The field is active with a dark outline and currently displays "0:15." as text being entered, indicating the existing end time is being replaced or completed. The full screen shows the YouTube watch page for "Taylor Swift - Love Story" with the "创建剪辑" panel open on the right, including a title area, the start and end time boxes, a thumbnail timeline below, and the main video player on the left.
caption.action: Type "0.00:15.0" into the active end time field in the clip editor.
caption.expectation: The end time field should update to the typed value, adjusting the selected clip duration and timeline preview accordingly.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on a light gray blank area above the clip timeline and above the end-time input box that currently displays "0:15.0". The X is not on a button, icon, text field, or draggable handle; it is on empty panel background inside the YouTube clip editor. The full screen shows the YouTube watch page with the "创建剪辑" panel open on the right, the video playing on the left, and the clip timing controls and thumbnail timeline visible in the editor.
caption.action: Click the blank light gray area inside the clip editor panel above the timeline and time fields.
caption.expectation: The editor should remain open; focus may leave the end-time text box, ending text editing without opening any menu or changing tools.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped view centers on the YouTube clip editor title field near the top of the right sidebar. The text box is active and currently contains the lowercase text "hell", with a character counter shown to the right below the line. This indicates text is being entered into the clip title and the new text is appending to the existing "hell" rather than replacing it. The full screen shows the YouTube watch page for "Taylor Swift - Love Story" in Chrome, with the video on the left and the "创建剪辑" panel on the right containing the title field, start and end time boxes, thumbnail timeline, and blue share clip button.
caption.action: Type "HELLO" into the active clip title field.
caption.expectation: The title field should update by adding the typed text after the existing content, and the character counter should increase accordingly.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the blue rounded button labeled "分享剪辑" at the bottom-right of the YouTube clip editor panel, with a "取消" text option to its left. This is a clickable UI control. The full screen shows the YouTube watch page in Chrome for "Taylor Swift - Love Story," with the video player on the left and the "创建剪辑" sidebar open on the right, containing the clip title "hello," start and end time fields, the thumbnail timeline, and the share clip button targeted by the X.
caption.action: Click the blue "分享剪辑" button in the clip editor.
caption.expectation: The clip should be created and YouTube should open a sharing result, such as a link, share dialog, or confirmation panel for the new clip.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the blue rounded button labeled "复制" at the right end of a clip URL field inside a white share dialog. The button is a clickable UI control. The full screen shows YouTube in Chrome with the video page dimmed behind an open "分享" dialog. The dialog contains sharing icons such as WhatsApp, Facebook, X, email, and a right-arrow button, with the clip link displayed in a text box above the targeted copy button.
caption.action: Click the blue "复制" button in the share dialog.
caption.expectation: The clip URL should be copied to the clipboard, and the share dialog may briefly show a copied confirmation while remaining open.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the small gray tab-close button with a black "X" inside the active browser tab at the top of Chrome. This is a UI control in the tab bar, not part of the webpage. The full screen shows Google Chrome on a YouTube video page with a white "分享" share dialog still open over the video, and the browser has multiple tabs visible across the top.
caption.action: Click the tab's close "X" button in the top browser tab bar.
caption.expectation: The current YouTube tab should close immediately, removing the page and its share dialog, and Chrome should switch focus to the adjacent remaining tab.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the entire Chrome window because this is a hotkey action. The active text entry area is the browser address bar at the very top, outlined in blue with the insertion caret at the far left; it appears empty and ready to receive pasted content, replacing any placeholder rather than appending visible text. The full screen shows a Chrome new tab page in Chinese with the Google logo centered, a large Google search box below it, several circular shortcut icons such as YouTube and GitHub, and another tab to the left titled with a Taylor Swift YouTube page.
caption.action: Press Ctrl+V to paste the clipboard contents into the browser address bar.
caption.expectation: The copied text, likely the previously copied YouTube clip link, should appear in the address bar, ready to be opened if submitted.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the top of Chrome with the pasted YouTube clip URL visible in the address bar on the new tab; the whole browser top bar is framed because this is a keyboard action, and a red X overlay is present but should be ignored for this Enter key action. The full screen shows Chrome on a Google new tab page in Chinese, with the Google logo centered, shortcut icons below, and the address bar expanded with suggestions containing the same YouTube clip link.
caption.action: Press Enter to navigate to the pasted YouTube clip URL in the address bar.
caption.expectation: Chrome should load the YouTube clip page, replacing the new tab page with the destination video content.
